title: Whoever is Watching
description: A small mod in the early stages of development, that will add horror events and mobs.
body:
- **WARNING: this can damage or break your world and is also a horror modification so be careful.
It is not recommended to install the mod on the server as it may not work correctly, cause crashes, lags or bugs.** This mod will add you small horror events that can appear randomly. Also the mod will add infection, which can be seen after some time. It will infect mobs making them more aggressive stronger faster tenacious. And will add new structures that you can meet in the world. New weapons, items, tools, blocks, mobs, armor and more will appear.

# A horror mod that transforms Minecraft into a dangerous and unsettling world.

The mod introduces evolving parasites, abandoned structures with hidden notes, and atmospheric mechanics designed to create tension and fear while exploring.

Parasites grow stronger over time through a phase system, making the world increasingly hostile. As the infection spreads, new threats and stronger parasite forms begin to appear.

The world also contains abandoned structures where players can find notes that reveal pieces of the story behind the parasite outbreak.

The mod adds several survival mechanics, including environmental dangers and unpredictable events like rocket bombardments.

To enhance the horror atmosphere, the mod includes effects such as blinking and nightmares, making exploration feel more intense and immersive.

Explore carefully, survive the infection, and uncover what happened to this world.
